_note: Generic few-shot corpus (description -> spec) for the AI assistant. When an LLM endpoint is configured, the worker retrieves the closest examples and injects them as few-shot context. Each item is a {desc, ficha} pair: 'desc' = typical user phrasing (keywords); 'ficha' = a valid output spec for the deterministic generator. These are GENERIC starter examples in English — replace or extend them with your own curated corpus for your deployment.

ejemplos.desc: reinforced concrete building, several stories, beams and columns, bays in X and Y
structural steel frame, IPE profiles for beams and HEB for columns
two-story timber house, stud walls 2x4 at 40cm, floor joists 2x8 at 60cm, gable truss roof, residential use
single gable roof truss, pratt or howe or warren, given span and slope
industrial warehouse, steel portal frames with roof trusses, column height and frame spacing
